industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Shikoku Electric Power Company, Incorporated
summary: Shikoku Electric Power Company, Incorporated generates, transmits, distributes, and sells electricity in Japan and internationally. The company operates through Electric Power Business, Telecommunications Business, Construction and Engineering Business, Energy Business, and Other Business segments. It generates electricity through nuclear, thermal, hydro, solar, wind, and biomass sources. The company also provides fiber optic internet, cost mobile, and data center and cloud-related services; and supplies gas. In addition, it offers nursing care facilities and lifestyle support services. The company operates electric power generating facilities with a total capacity of 5,435 MW; 209 substations; transmission lines of 3,391 km; and distribution lines of 46,125 km. It serves 2.1 million industrial, commercial, and residential customers. Shikoku Electric Power Company, Incorporated was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Takamatsu, Japan.
